plan_overview: Add a 'Prettify Project' button to the editor toolbar to allow users to automatically format their USFM project. Optionally extend the save dialog to allow reverting all changes.
technical_context: The button will trigger actions.prettifyProject() from WorkspaceContext. The toolbar is located in src/app/ui/components/blocks/Toolbar.tsx.

tasks.description: Extend Save Dialog with 'Revert All' button (Optional)
steps: Check if save dialog can be extended

tasks.description: Add integration tests for the Prettify feature
steps: Test Prettify Book with messy USFM content
Test Prettify Project with multiple files

tasks.description: Add E2E tests for the Prettify feature
steps: Test Prettify Book via Action Palette

tasks.description: Document the Prettify feature and architecture pattern
steps: Update plan-prettify.md with final implementation details
